items.name: kino
items.title: Kino
items.description: Root provider that initializes the shared scroll tracker for all react-kino components.

items.name: scene
items.title: Scene
items.description: Pinned scroll section with progress-based children rendering. The core building block for scroll-driven storytelling.

items.name: reveal
items.title: Reveal
items.description: Scroll-triggered entrance animation with multiple presets: fade, fade-up, fade-down, scale, blur.

items.name: parallax
items.title: Parallax
items.description: Speed-shifted scroll layer. Elements move faster or slower than natural scroll speed for depth effects.

items.name: counter
items.title: Counter
items.description: Animated number counter that interpolates between values as the user scrolls.

items.name: compare-slider
items.title: CompareSlider
items.description: Before/after comparison slider. Supports drag interaction or scroll-driven reveal.

items.name: horizontal-scroll
items.title: HorizontalScroll
items.description: Horizontal scroll section that converts vertical scroll into horizontal panel movement.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Scroll progress indicator with bar, dots, and ring variants.

items.name: video-scroll
items.title: VideoScroll
items.description: Scroll-driven video scrubber. Pins a video and scrubs its currentTime based on scroll progress.

items.name: text-reveal
items.title: TextReveal
items.description: Progressive text reveal that highlights words, characters, or lines as the user scrolls.
